common.name: Name
home.tagline: Pick a quiz, race the clock, see who comes out on top.
home.noPopularQuizzes: No quizzes have been played yet. Check back soon.
home.demoLine1: This is the Top Banana! demo. Everything resets daily.
home.demoLine2: The button signs you in to a shared host account with no sign-up, so you can build and host a quiz.
home.demoButton: Sign in and host a quiz
allQuizzes.tagline: Every quiz, ordered by most recently updated.
allQuizzes.empty: No quizzes have been published yet.
login.heading: Log in
login.subtitle: Welcome back. Sign in to manage your quizzes.
register.heading: Register
register.subtitle: Sign up with your email and a password to get started.
register.name: Name
register.nameHint: Leave blank to use a generated name.
forgotPassword.heading: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link.
resetPassword.heading: Set a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Pick a fresh one.
resetPasswordInvalid.heading: Link is no longer valid
resetPasswordInvalid.body: This reset link has expired or was already used. Request a fresh one and try again.
verifyEmailPending.heading: Verify your email
verifyEmailPending.sentTo: We sent a confirmation link to
verifyEmailPending.sentAfter: Click it to finish setting up your account.
verifyEmailRequest.heading: Resend verification email
verifyEmailRequest.subtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send a fresh verification link.
acceptInvite.heading: Accept your invite
acceptInvite.subtitle: Pick a display name and a password to set up your account.
acceptInviteInvalid.heading: Invite link is no longer valid
acceptInviteInvalid.body: This invite has expired or was already used. Ask whoever invited you to send a fresh one.
accessDenied.heading: Access denied
accessDenied.subtitle: This area requires an admin account.
accessDenied.onlyAdmins: but the page you tried to open is only available to admins.
profile.heading: Profile
profile.subtitle: Your account settings.
profile.nameHint: This is the name your leaderboard rows are shown under.
profileEmail.subtitle: Switch the address tied to your account.
profileEmail.newEmailHint: We'll send a verification link to the new address. Your account email switches when you click that link, not before.
profileEmail.passwordHint: Confirm your current password to start an email change.
profileEmail.providerManaged: Your email is managed by your sign-in provider and can't be changed here.
profilePassword.subtitle: Pick a fresh password. Other signed-in sessions will be signed out.
play.claimSyncPrompt: Want this name on your other devices?
play.submitError: Couldn't submit your answer. Please try again.
play.advanceError: Couldn't load the next question. Please try again.
play.startError: Couldn't start the quiz. Please refresh and try again.
play.startPreviewError: Couldn't start the preview. Please refresh and try again.
play.shareResultText: I scored {score} on {title}. Think you can beat me?
leaderboard.heading: Leaderboard
leaderboard.beFirst: No finishers yet. Be the first.
hud.question: Q
claim.title: Pick a display name
claim.help: This is the name that will appear on the leaderboard.
claim.saveError: Couldn't save your name. Try again later.
claim.alreadyNamed: This account already has a name.
join.heading: Join a game
join.enterCodePrompt: Enter the room code shown on the screen.
join.namePrompt: Pick a name everyone will see in the lobby.
join.sessionClosed: This game is no longer available.
join.waitingStartGame: Waiting for the host to start the game...
join.waitingStartQuiz: Waiting for the host to start a quiz...
join.bigScreenHint: Look at the big screen for the question.
join.answerError: Couldn't submit your answer. Tap again to retry.
join.answerLocked: Answer locked in, waiting for everyone else...
join.nextRoundComing: The next round is coming up.
join.waitingNextQuiz: Waiting for the host to start the next quiz...
join.exitConfirmBody: You will drop out of the lobby and your roster row will be removed. You can rejoin with the same code.
join.readyError: Couldn't update your ready state. Try again.
join.joinError: Couldn't join the game. Try again.
join.noGameFound: No game found with that code.
